mentions.description:
Can hard water cause skin problems?
Hard water contains minerals like calcium and magnesium that leave a residue on your skin. This makes it harder for soap to rinse off, which can strip natural oils, clog pores, and cause dryness or irritation over time.
In the Austin Area, hard water is very common. If your skin feels tight after showering or your soap does not lather well, your water may be affecting your skin more than you realize.
